blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
